ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the stock data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* The closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "adjusted_close_price" REAL /* The adjusted closing price, which accounts for corporate actions like dividends and stock splits */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* The dividend amount paid on the given date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* The split coefficient to account for stock splits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* The first name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* The last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for additional contact information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* The ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange on which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp when the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stocks" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "follow_date" TEXT /* The date when the user started following the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* The type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* The frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* The status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date for which the prediction is made */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* The predicted price of the stock */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* The confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the predictive model used to generate the prediction */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* The type of predictive model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock related to the news */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the news article */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* The date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the news article */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL to the full news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The content of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* The number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* The number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "metric" TEXT /* The metric being analyzed (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "value" REAL /* The value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the metric was analyzed */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the analytics data */,
  "method" TEXT /* The method used to compute the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the report */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* The type of report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* The name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* The description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* The weight of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* The price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* The date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_value" REAL /* The current value of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "total_gain_loss" REAL /* The total gain or loss of the stock in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id", "stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* The type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* The price of the stock at the time of the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date the transaction was made */,
  "commission" REAL /* The commission charged for the transaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
